data.title: Trump memecoin dinner attendees could include foreign nationals — Report
data.description:
At least some of the top holders of Donald Trump’s memecoin who apply to attend a private dinner with the president could be based outside the United States. According to a May 7 Bloomberg report based on an analysis of the top TRUMP tokenholders, 19 of the top 25 wallets on the leaderboard used foreign exchanges that exclude US-based customers, suggesting either foreign nationals or Americans living abroad. In addition, more than half of the top 220 holders — the group eligible to apply for a dinner with the president — also used exchanges in other countries. Top 10 TRUMP memecoin holders as of May
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/donald-trump-memecoin-dinner-foreign?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: EU to place huge tariffs on Boeing jets as retaliation for Trump
data.description:
The European Union is preparing to slap heavy trade penalties on Boeing aircraft as part of a broader retaliation strategy if current talks with Donald Trump’s White House fail. Brussels will propose new duties targeting American civilian jets and other major exports, escalating a tariff war that’s already frozen key trade routes. The planned tariffs […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/eu-to-place-huge-tariffs-on-boeing-jets/

data.title: Coinbase Launches x402 for Stablecoin Payments via Standard Internet Protocols
data.description:
TL;DR Coinbase launched x402, a protocol that enables instant stablecoin transfers over HTTP, integrating payments directly into web interactions. The initiative allows AI agents to operate autonomously, contracting services, accessing resources, and paying in real time. x402 was developed in collaboration with AWS, Circle, Anthropic, and Near Protocol. Coinbase unveiled an initiative that could revolutionize
source: https://crypto-economy.com/coinbase-launches-x402-for-stablecoin-payments-via-standard-internet-protocols/

data.title: Coinbase to List PAX Gold (PAXG)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase announced that it will support PAX Gold (PAXG) on the Ethereum network (ERC-20 token). If liquidity conditions are met, trading will begin on or after 9:00 a.m. Pacific Time on May 8, 2025. Once the supply of the asset is sufficient, the PAXG-USD trading pair will be launched in phases. Some supported jurisdictions may limit support for PAXG.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Advocates for America as Leading Digital Asset Hub
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Besant recently emphasized that the United States should be the preferred destination for digital assets. His remarks come amid intense legislative debates over the establishment of a regulatory framework for cryptocurrencies.

During a House Financial Services Committee hearing on Wednesday, Besant was questioned about the necessity for the U.S. to maintain a leading position in the crypto sector. He affirmed, "We firmly believe that the U.S. should be the primary destination for digital assets." Besant highlighted the ongoing efforts by the committee and Senate colleagues to develop a comprehensive market structure, aiming to set U.S. industry standards as a global benchmark.

data.title: Analysts Say $95K Is the Threshold for Bitcoin’s Next Major Move
data.description:

This week’s Federal Reserve decisions and the market’s positive sentiment could decisively influence Bitcoin’s direction. In recent hours, Bitcoin has been flirting. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/analysts-say-95k-is-the-threshold-for-bitcoins-next-major-move/
